metadata.description: Pre-built skills that allows you to build, connect, debug and operate applications with Kurrent, plus migration tooling for legacy EventStoreDB clients.

plugins.name: kurrent
plugins.description: Pre-built skills and agents for KurrentDB: building and operating apps with the current client SDKs, running the self-hosted server, deploying on Kurrent Cloud, and migrating off legacy EventStoreDB clients (TCP, esdb:// rebrand, smoke tests).
